name: The Sovereign Round
description: A flawless round brilliant exhibiting extraordinary fire and scintillation. Sourced from the Jwaneng mine in Botswana, this stone represents the pinnacle of natural diamond cutting.

name: The Empress Oval
description: An elongated oval with exceptional brilliance and a length-to-width ratio of 1.45. The warm undertones of this South African stone create a mesmerizing play of light.

name: The Architect Emerald
description: A commanding emerald cut with hall-of-mirrors brilliance. The step-cut facets create dramatic flashes of light, revealing the stone's extraordinary clarity.

name: The Crown Princess
description: A precision-cut princess with 76 facets delivering maximum fire. Ethically sourced from the Ekati mine in Canada's Northwest Territories.

name: The Teardrop
description: A dramatic pear shape with perfect symmetry between the rounded and pointed ends. The brilliance pattern shifts as the stone moves, creating a living display of light.

name: The Heritage Cushion
description: A modified cushion brilliant combining old-world charm with modern cutting precision. The broad facets create a distinctive pattern of light and shadow.

name: The Collector's Round
description: An internally flawless round brilliant of exceptional size. This museum-quality stone represents the rarest grade of natural diamond — fewer than 1% achieve this classification.

name: The Parcel Collection
description: A curated parcel of 97 melee diamonds, calibrated to 1.0-1.1mm. Ideal for haute joaillerie settings requiring consistent brilliance across multiple stones.

name: The Velvet Night
description: A near-colorless round brilliant with exceptional light performance. The warm G color creates a subtle warmth that many collectors prefer over the clinical whiteness of D-E stones.

name: The Artisan Princess
description: A substantial princess cut with chevron-pattern faceting that maximizes brilliance. The Canadian origin ensures full ethical traceability from mine to market.

name: The Infinite Emerald
description: A D-color emerald cut of remarkable transparency. The step-cut pavilion creates an infinite corridor of reflections, giving this stone its name among collectors.

name: The Dawn Collection
description: An accessible entry into the Vault Maison collection. This one-carat round brilliant offers exceptional value with eye-clean clarity and warm color that flatters any setting.
